restaurant.name: Zappy Indian Spice
restaurant.description: Authentic premium Indian dining and street food delicacies.

items.name: Medu Vada Combo
items.description: Crispy golden fried lentil donuts with a soft, fluffy center. Served with hot sambar and coconut chutney.

items.name: Masala Dosa Classic
items.description: Thin, crispy golden rice crepe stuffed with spiced mashed potato bhaji. Served with sambar and house chutneys.

items.name: Idli Sambar Dipped
items.description: Two super-soft, pillowy steamed rice cakes dipped in piping hot aromatic tiffin sambar with a drizzle of ghee.

items.name: Ghee Podi Roast Dosa
items.description: Crispy golden dosa smeared with aromatic spicy karam podi (gunpowder) and rich desi cow ghee.

items.name: Lacy Rava Dosa
items.description: Lacy, ultra-crispy semolina crepe tempered with black pepper, cumin, ginger, and green chillies.

items.name: Golden Onion Uthappam
items.description: Thick, soft rice pancake topped with fresh chopped onions, green chillies, and fresh coriander.

items.name: Delhi Poori Bhaji
items.description: Two fluffy, deep-fried whole wheat puffed breads served with mild potato masala and spicy pickle.

items.name: Stuffed Paneer Paratha
items.description: Flaky whole wheat bread stuffed with seasoned grated paneer, fresh herbs, and served with yogurt and butter.

items.name: Punjabi Aloo Paratha
items.description: Classic Punjabi griddled bread stuffed with spiced potato mash, served with rich butter and tangy mango pickle.

items.name: Royal Chole Bhature
items.description: Huge, fluffy fried leavened bread served with rich, spicy chickpeas curry (chole), onions, and green chilies.

items.name: Paneer Butter Masala
items.description: Succulent cubes of cottage cheese simmered in a rich, velvety tomato and cashew nut gravy finished with cream.

items.name: Tandoori Butter Chicken
items.description: Tandoori grilled chicken chunks cooked in a rich, buttery, creamy tomato sauce with aromatic fenugreek leaves.

items.name: Slow Cooked Dal Makhani
items.description: Slow-cooked black lentils simmered overnight with cream, butter, and tomatoes for that signature smoky richness.

items.name: Stir Fried Kadhai Paneer
items.description: Paneer chunks stir-fried with bell peppers, onions, and freshly ground kadhai spices in a tangy tomato gravy.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Smoky, clay-oven roasted chicken tikkas tossed in a thick, spicy, and tangy onion-tomato masala gravy.

items.name: Kashmiri Mutton Rogan Josh
items.description: A classic Kashmiri lamb delicacy cooked with a rich blend of traditional warm spices and yogurt.

items.name: Royal Malai Kofta
items.description: Crispy fried cottage cheese and potato dumplings stuffed with dry fruits, simmered in a mild, sweetish white gravy.

items.name: Bhindi Do Pyaza
items.description: Fresh okra stir-fried with plenty of onions, double-tossed with tangy, dry aromatic spices.

items.name: Ghee Garlic Dal Tadka
items.description: Creamy yellow lentils tempered with ghee, cumin seeds, garlic, dried red chillies, and fresh coriander.

items.name: Aloo Gobi Adraki
items.description: Homestyle dry potato and cauliflower dish cooked with a dominant flavor of julienned fresh ginger and green chilies.

items.name: Hyderabadi Dum Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with juicy, marinated chicken cooked on dum with saffron, ghee, and fresh mint.

items.name: Veg Dum Biryani Feast
items.description: Slow-cooked seasonal vegetables tossed in exotic handpicked spices, layered with long-grain basmati rice.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Dum Biryani
items.description: Charcoal-grilled paneer tikkas layered with aromatic basmati rice, caramelised onions, and saffron milk.

items.name: Egg Masala Dum Biryani
items.description: Boiled and pan-fried eggs cooked in a spicy masala gravy, layered with fragrant saffron rice and fried onions.

items.name: Special Mutton Dum Biryani
items.description: Melt-in-your-mouth tender mutton pieces marinated in spices and slow-cooked with basmati rice for maximum flavor.

items.name: Kolkata Chicken Biryani
items.description: Subtly spiced fragrant rice cooked with succulent chicken, egg, and the signature soft, spiced slow-cooked potato.

items.name: Lucknowi Awadhi Mutton
items.description: A royal delicacy featuring rich, cardamon-infused mutton cooked in pure yakhni stock, layered with fine basmati.

items.name: Malabar Prawns Biryani
items.description: Fragrant short-grain Khyma rice cooked with spicy, tangy stir-fried prawns, finished with fried cashews.

items.name: Aromatic Ghee Jeera Rice
items.description: Long grain basmati rice tossed in pure cow ghee and plenty of aromatic roasted cumin seeds.

items.name: Fiery Chicken 65 Biryani
items.description: Spicy and crunchy deep-fried Chicken 65 tossed in yogurt, layered with flavorful biryani rice.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Pizza
items.description: Spicy clay-oven roasted chicken tikkas, onions, capsicum, and fresh coriander on a buttery tandoori-spiced sauce.

items.name: Tandoori Paneer Pizza
items.description: Cubes of marinated paneer tikka, red bell peppers, onions, and jalapeños over creamy cheese and tandoori spread.

items.name: Margherita Classic Pizza
items.description: Simply elegant featuring house-made rich tomato sauce, plenty of gooey mozzarella cheese, and fresh torn basil leaves.

items.name: Butter Chicken Pizza
items.description: Pulled juicy butter chicken, red onions, fresh coriander, and melted mozzarella over a sweet-and-smoky butter chicken base.

items.name: Veggie Paradise Pizza
items.description: A colorful garden of baby corn, sweet corn, black olives, onions, capsicum, red paprika, and extra cheese.

items.name: Spicy Triple Tango
items.description: Hot red paprika, golden sweet corn, and spicy jalapeños over a fiery chili-garlic tomato spread.

items.name: Double Cheese Margherita
items.description: Loaded with double the quantity of pure liquid mozzarella cheese over our signature herb-spiced tomato base.

items.name: Keema Garlic Crust
items.description: Spiced minced mutton keema, garlic flakes, red onions, and mozzarella on a thick, garlic-infused golden crust.

items.name: Tandoori Mushroom Delight
items.description: Smoky clay-oven roasted mushrooms, sweet onions, and capsicum with mozzarella cheese on a tandoori base.

items.name: Supreme Chicken Meat Feast
items.description: The ultimate carnivore dream with chicken tikka, spicy chicken sausage, sliced salami, and minced keema.

items.name: Crispy Chicken 65
items.description: Juicy deep-fried chicken cubes tossed in a spicy, fiery yogurt and curry leaves marinade. Absolute bestseller.

items.name: Paneer Tikka Charcoal
items.description: Chunks of cottage cheese marinated in spiced yogurt and grilled to a smoky golden in the clay oven.

items.name: Hara Bhara Kabab Duo
items.description: Crispy fried patties made of fresh spinach, green peas, potatoes, and mild aromatic spices, stuffed with cashews.

items.name: Tandoori Chicken Claypot
items.description: Half bone-in chicken marinated in house tandoori masala and roasted to charcoal perfection in the clay oven.

items.name: Crispy Fish Koliwada
items.description: Crispy batter-fried fish fillets seasoned with Mumbai-style chili paste, carom seeds, and hot spices.

items.name: Mutton Seekh Kabab
items.description: Minced spiced lamb skewers grilled in the clay oven, served with green chutney and onion rings.

items.name: Delhi Dahi Ke Kabab
items.description: Delicate, melt-in-your-mouth patties made of hung yogurt, paneer, and green cardamon, golden fried.

items.name: Crispy Corn Pepper Salt
items.description: Deep fried sweet corn kernels tossed with finely chopped garlic, spring onions, and freshly ground black pepper.

items.name: Chilli Garlic Crispy Potatoes
items.description: Crispy fried baby potatoes tossed in a sticky, sweet-and-spicy chili-garlic paste.

items.name: Chicken Seekh Kabab
items.description: Skewered minced chicken seasoned with herbs, mint, and garam spices, roasted over charcoal.

items.name: Rasam Tangy Souplet
items.description: A warm, thin, tangy South Indian soup prepared using sweet tamarind, tomato, black pepper, and cumin.

items.name: Velvety Tomato Soup
items.description: Rich and velvety fresh tomato soup finished with fresh cream, served with crispy buttered croutons.

items.name: Spicy Veg Manchow Soup
items.description: Hot and spicy Chinese vegetable soup flavored with soy sauce, loaded with fresh garlic, ginger, and crispy noodles.

items.name: Hot & Sour Chicken Soup
items.description: Thick, fiery, and tangy soup loaded with shredded chicken, bamboo shoots, and mushrooms.

items.name: Creamy Sweet Corn Veg
items.description: Comforting, creamy, and mildly sweet soup loaded with fresh sweet corn kernels and minced vegetables.

items.name: Zesty Lemon Coriander
items.description: Light and refreshing clear vegetable soup spiked with fresh lemon juice and plenty of chopped coriander leaves.

items.name: Comforting Chicken Broth
items.description: A comforting clear chicken soup simmered with fresh herbs, ginger, black pepper, and chicken strips.

items.name: Creamy Sweet Corn Chicken
items.description: A soothing sweet corn soup whipped with soft egg whites and delicious shredded chicken.

items.name: Fiery Tom Yum Veg
items.description: A fragrant Thai hot-and-sour soup simmered with lemongrass, galangal, kaffir lime leaves, and mushrooms.

items.name: Garlic Shorba Lentil
items.description: A rich, slow-simmered spiced yellow lentil soup tempered with cumin, garlic, and a hint of fresh lemon juice.

items.name: Veg Hakka Noodles
items.description: Wok-tossed thin noodles cooked with crunchy cabbage, bell peppers, carrots, spring onions, and light soy sauce.

items.name: Gobi Manchurian Dry
items.description: Crispy batter-fried cauliflower florets tossed in a sweet, spicy, and tangy Indo-Chinese Manchurian sauce.

items.name: Classic Veg Fried Rice
items.description: Aromatic wok-tossed jasmine rice with finely chopped seasonal vegetables, spring onions, and a splash of soy.

items.name: Schezwan Chicken Noodles
items.description: Fiery noodles tossed in our house-made spicy, pungent Schezwan chili sauce with tender chicken strips.

items.name: Chilli Chicken Gravy
items.description: Tender batter-fried chicken chunks simmered in a dark soy and chili sauce with bell peppers and green chillies.

items.name: Schezwan Veg Fried Rice
items.description: Spicy, wok-fried rice tossed with chopped veggies in a fiery Schezwan chili paste, very popular.

items.name: Paneer Chilli Dry Sauté
items.description: Cubes of crispy cottage cheese tossed with capsicum, onion, ginger, garlic, and hot green chillies in soy sauce.

items.name: Wok Egg Fried Rice
items.description: Fluffy wok-tossed rice stir-fried with scrambled eggs, fresh seasonal veggies, soy sauce, and white pepper.

items.name: Veg Spring Rolls Crisp
items.description: Four golden, crispy fried wrapper sheets stuffed with seasoned julienned stir-fried vegetables, served with sweet-chili dip.

items.name: Chicken Manchurian Gravy
items.description: Juicy fried chicken balls cooked in a rich, velvety dark brown ginger-garlic Manchurian gravy.

items.name: Gulab Jamun Premium
items.description: Two classic warm milk solid dumplings fried golden brown, steeped in cardamom-scented sweet sugar syrup.

items.name: Kesar Rasmalai Duo
items.description: Two soft, spongy cottage cheese discs soaked in cardamon, saffron, and pistachio-rich reduced milk.

items.name: Royal Rose Falooda
items.description: Rich, chilled milk layered with sweet rose syrup, basil seeds (sabza), vermicelli, topped with vanilla ice cream and nuts.

items.name: Sizzling Hot Brownie
items.description: A warm, fudgy eggless chocolate brownie served on a piping hot iron plate, topped with vanilla scoop and hot chocolate fudge.

items.name: Malai Kulfi Stick
items.description: Traditional dense and creamy Indian ice cream enriched with saffron, cardamon, and roasted pistachios on a stick.

items.name: Desi Moong Dal Halwa
items.description: A rich, classic winter dessert made from yellow split lentils, cooked slowly with plenty of pure ghee, sugar, and dry fruits.

items.name: Ghee Gajar Halwa
items.description: Slow-cooked fresh grated red carrots simmered with rich milk, khoya, pure ghee, and studded with toasted cashew nuts.

items.name: Double Vanilla Fudge
items.description: Two premium scoops of velvety, smooth vanilla bean ice cream finished with a drizzle of rich chocolate syrup.

items.name: Kesar Pista Delight
items.description: Two scoops of aromatic saffron ice cream loaded with crunchy toasted slivered pistachios and almonds.

items.name: Sweet Paniyaram Jaggery
items.description: Seven sweet dumplings made of fermented rice batter, pure organic dark jaggery, cardamom, and coconut bites.

items.name: Filter Coffee Brass
items.description: Strong, authentic decoction brewed with chicory, mixed with frothed hot milk, served in a traditional brass tumbler.

items.name: Kadak Masala Chai
items.description: Strong milk tea slow-brewed with fresh crushed ginger, green cardamon, cinnamon, and black pepper.

items.name: Creamy Mango Lassi
items.description: Thick, luscious yogurt-based sweet drink blended with fresh sweet Alphonso mango pulp and saffron cardamom.

items.name: Punjab Sweet Lassi
items.description: A giant glass of whipped sweet yogurt drink topped with a thick layer of malai cream and slivered nuts.

items.name: Fresh Lime Soda Mint
items.description: Tangy and refreshing lemon soda served sweet, salted, or mixed according to your preference.

items.name: Cooling Masala Chaas
items.description: Refreshing, cold, and thin buttermilk churned with fresh ginger, green chillies, coriander, and roasted cumin.

items.name: Coca Cola Chilled Can
items.description: A chilled 330ml can of original refreshing fizzy Coca Cola.

items.name: Diet Coke Sugarfree
items.description: A chilled 330ml can of zero sugar, zero calorie Diet Coke.

items.name: Sprite Lime Can
items.description: A chilled 330ml can of refreshing lemon-lime Sprite.

items.name: Ice Blended Cold Coffee
items.description: Rich, chilled milk blended with espresso, vanilla ice cream, and chocolate syrup, topped with coco dust.

items.name: Pani Puri Bomb Shells
items.description: Ten crispy puffed puris served with sweet tamarind chutney, spicy mint water, and spiced potato-chickpea mash.

items.name: Crispy Samosa Plate
items.description: Two crispy triangular pastry crusts stuffed with spiced potatoes and peas, served with sweet and green chutneys.

items.name: Delectable Samosa Chaat
items.description: Crushed hot samosas smothered with spicy white peas curry (ragda), whipped yogurt, sweet-tangy chutneys, onions, and sev.

items.name: Mumbai Butter Pav Bhaji
items.description: Spicy, buttery mashed vegetable curry cooked on a flat tawa, served with two soft butter-toasted pav breads.

items.name: Classic Mumbai Vada Pav
items.description: The classic Mumbai street burger featuring a spicy fried potato dumpling in a soft bun smeared with hot dry garlic chutney.

items.name: Tangy Sev Bhel Puri
items.description: Crunchy puffed rice tossed with fresh chopped onions, tomatoes, raw mango, spiced potato, sweet tamarind, and spicy mint chutneys.

items.name: Dahi Puri Chat Bomb
items.description: Ten puffed crisp puris filled with potatoes, sprouts, flooded with sweet yogurt, tangy chutneys, and fine sev.

items.name: Punjabi Aloo Tikki Chaat
items.description: Two crispy griddled potato patties covered with warm chickpea chole curry, yogurt, sweet-spicy chutneys, and onions.

items.name: Paneer Bread Pakoda Tri
items.description: Two golden-fried spiced gram flour battered bread triangles stuffed with spiced paneer slice and mint chutney.

items.name: Cheese Loaded Pav Bhaji
items.description: Our rich Mumbai-style pav bhaji smothered with a giant handful of grated processed cheddar cheese.
